title: Modify Action Direct
description: Modify an existing airfoil action vector by updating specific control points directly.

base_csv.description: Path to the base action CSV.

pt_idx.description: List of control point indices to modify (0-indexed).

values.description: List of [radius_param, angle_param, edgy_param] for each index in pt_idx. ALL VALUES MUST BE IN [-1.0, 1.0].

name.description: Name for the new action file.
